ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., voice, governance effectiveness) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the indicator measures */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of indicator (e.g., governance, social, economic) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_indicators" (
  "country_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being evaluated */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator being measured */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for the measurement */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned for the indicator in that year */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the indicator score */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the indicator score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_indicators_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_indicators_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password (hashed for security) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* User's affiliated organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country-indicator record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_indicator_id") REFERENCES country_indicators ("country_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Europe, Asia) */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_regions" (
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-region relationship */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year represented as an integer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator to which this metadata belongs */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date this metadata was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)
